candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line. However, it appears to be a component of the selected COGS bucket because Cost of Operating Revenue matches the cost-of-revenue total, and the numbers indicate the total is composed of unclassified cost of revenues plus this depreciation line. Adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-related D&A, not COGS-related, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Depreciation in Cost of Revenues appears already embedded in the selected COGS row Cost of Operating Revenue / cost-of-revenue total, so no separate add-back row should be selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the explicit SG&A-related D&A line. But the previously selected XSGA bucket was Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses, which by wording excludes only R&D and therefore likely already includes SG&A depreciation. Adding this row separately would risk double counting.
This is COGS-related D&A, not SG&A-related, so it should not be mapped to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: Conservative treatment to avoid double counting: the selected SG&A-ex-R&D bucket likely already contains SG&A depreciation, since the exclusion is specific to R&D rather than D&A.
